calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Fix Atty'S Fees As A Cost Of Suit
Off Calendar Jan-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Fix Attorney's Fees hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Appearances:
David Nolan, Esq. for Cross Defendant Masha Polk-Townsend.
Robert Paul Garcia, Esq. for Cross Plaintiffs Rodrigo Santiago and Susie Santiago.
After hearing the evidence, arguement and opposition, matter submitted and under submission.
Order Granted on Jan. 14, 2004 by Comm. Kaplan, for the amount of $3,179.20
Order signed.

Motion By Susie Santiago And Rodrigo Santiago To Vacate Judgment And Enter A Different Judgment Based On Variance From Statement Of Decision
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Vacate Judgment and Enter a Different Judgment Based on Variance from Statement of Decision hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Romy Barulich.
Appearances:
Roger Paul Garcia, Esq., for Moving Parties, defendants Susie Santiago and Rodrigo Santiago. No opposition filed.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants the motion. Attorney fees to be based
on book account per Civil Code 1717.5 of $660.00. Plaintiff's USCB, Inc., Judgment to be amended as follows:
Principal $11,502.75
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $242.00
Interest of $2,150.00 for the total of $14,554.75.

Counsel to prepare order consistent with the motion and also prepare an amended judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: This case came on regularly as re-assigment from PJ department.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Appearances:
Lloyd Douglas, Esq. for Plaintiff USBC, Inc.
Robert P. Garcia, Esq. for Defendants/X-Complainants: Rodrigo Santiago Sr.and Susie Santiago sued as Azucena Santiago.
David C. Nolan, Esq. for Cross-Defendants: Cafe Metro; Polk-Townsend & Associates and Marsha Polk-Townsend.
Plaintiff Exhibits:
Exhibits 1 to 8 ID/EV by stipulation (no opposition)
Plaintiff Motion to Amend Judgment to include Defendant AKA- Granted
Plaintiff's motion for judgment on the pleading-Submitted and Granted as follows:
Principal $11,502.75; $2,100.50 Interest; $242.00 Costs and attorney fees per schedule.
Cross complaint trial.
Cross-Complainant Witness: Susie Santiago sworn and examined
Adverse Witness for Cross-Complainant: Marsha Polk-Thownsen sworn and examined
Cross-Complainant Exhibits:
Exhibit "A"- Kaiser Bill, 2 pages ID/EV
Exhibit "B"- Letter from Marsha Polk-Townsend, 1 page ID/EV
Exhibit "C" - Cafe Metro Hand Book ID/EV.
Cross-Defendant Motion to dismiss Marsha Polk-Townsen-Granted, Dismissed Without prejudice.
Court Request proposed Statement of decision from Cross-Complainant and Cross-Defendant to be submitted within two weeks. One Judgment to be entered and prepared by prevailing party.
